channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The permit does not match the roadworks website and the whole path/cycle path has been closed with no notice or instructions for the 2 mile diversion, 13th April
item.description:
The cycle path at the end of liddington road has been blocked and no notice or instructions for the 2 mile diversion. (Or to cycle down the a417). The permit displayed does not match the roadworks website, which does have open reach working there but with no indicationtions of total path closures

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foul drainage smells on Gravel Walk, 13th April
item.description:
Notable drainage smells coming from the mains drain pipe on Gravel Walk, inspection required

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Walk, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 13th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 13th April
item.description:
Road closure 28day please cut back overgrown brambles and vegetation approx 8 meters x1.5 (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 13th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 13th April
item.description:
CWED 1000 x 300 x 56mm Road Closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Noisy manhole outside 25 gloucester st, 13th April
item.description:
You came to 'fix' this last week. now it is actually more noisy than before! please do not do a box ticking exercise but do what this portal is called....................ie fix my street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Gloucester Street, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 13th April
item.description:

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post) problem, 13th April
item.description:
perm repair 43119231: Area Highway Technician reports that both non-illuminated, 'Keep Left', bollards at the location have been taken out
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post)
